title: 2021 Junior Certificate Examination Biology Sample Paper
subject: Biology
sourceNotes: The official source is image-only and was transcribed from embedded page images.
OCR was used as a working transcript aid, then checked against the page images.
Ordered page assets were written into infra/samples/golden/maneb-2021-jce-biology-sample-assets/paper-pages.

instructionsSummary: The paper contains three sections: A, B and C.
Answer all the questions in each section.
Section A should be answered by encircling the letter with the correct answer.
Sections B and C should be answered in the spaces provided.

notes: Section A contains multiple-choice questions only.
Observed visual dependencies: leaf, root system, vertebrates, germination table, skull.
Section B contains multi-part written questions.
Observed figure-bearing content: food web, photosynthesis experiment, arm skeleton and muscles, blood components, micro-organisms.
Section C contains essay questions only.

proofPolicy.nonNegotiableRule: No answer_any_n content was invented or mixed into the official workbook.

acceptanceGate.reason: The paper is official and satisfies the real-content proof obligations for MCQ, structured, essay, and figure-bearing content. The missing answer_any_n shape is intentionally validated in synthetic fixtures only.

nextAction: Use the generated golden workbook and manifest for staging preview/publish and preserve synthetic answer_any_n validation as a separate QA stream.
